## Validation

<!-- List the commands or manual checks you ran. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] This pull request has a focused scope and targets `main` from a topic branch.
- [ ] Commit subjects follow Conventional Commits.
- [ ] The branch is rebased onto the latest `origin/main` without merge commits.
- [ ] Behavior changes include tests or explain why tests are not applicable.
- [ ] Formatting, linting, tests, and the release build pass locally.
- [ ] User-facing or operational changes include the necessary documentation.
